reason: QA test for agent messaging and response verification - agent successfully received message and responded with correct answer.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Application loaded successfully, displaying the SuperAgent interface with sidebar showing "Your Agents" section.
Clicked on agent "QA-20260605-020019-1k60" in the sidebar — Agent detail page loaded, showing agent configuration and message input area.
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status confirmed as "idle" (visible in the status indicator next to agent name).
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in the message input field — Message successfully filled into the textbox (ref=e177).
Clicked the Send button to submit the message — Message sent successfully, triggering a new session "Simple Math Question Session" and agent status changed to "working".
Waited for agent response — Response received immediately (within seconds, well under the 3-minute timeout).

Verified response contains "4" and took screenshot — Agent response confirmed as "4" which is the correct answer to 2+2. Screenshot captured showing the complete conversation with user message "Hello! What is 2+2?" on the right and agent response "4" on the left.
